prestazioni: Engine swap to a **L47 Aurora V8 (4.0L DOHC 32V Northstar-derived)** with forged internals: Mahle forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from **Callies Performance** for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a **Garrett GT4202R turbocharger** (1.15 A/R turbine housing) and a **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** for 18 PSI of boost, targeting 550 WHP on E85.

Custom **Holley Dominator EFI** standalone ECU with **AEM CD-7 dash** integration, running a **Bosch Motorsport 0280158862 high-flow fuel pump** and **ID1700x injectors** (side-fed, 1700cc/min). Upgraded ignition system with **MSD 8 Plus** box and **NGK TR7IX** iridium plugs gapped at 0.028".

Chassis reinforcement with a **BMR Fabrication** subframe connectors (PN: SFC003) and **Hotchkis Sport Suspension** Stage 3 kit (front/rear sway bars, adjustable end links, and **Bilstein B16 coilovers** with 400 lb/in front springs and 350 lb/in rear springs). Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers** (355mm rotors) and **2-piston rear calipers** (330mm rotors) with **Hawk DTC-70 brake pads**.
estetica: **RK Sport** Aurora-specific widebody kit (fiberglass, 3" flares) with **AIT Racing** carbon fiber hood (functional dual NACA ducts) and **VIS Racing** carbon fiber trunk spoiler (adjustable angle).

Custom **PPG Hot Hues** paint in "Aurora Metallic Purple" with **3M Matte Black** roof wrap and **Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro** sequential LED taillights (OEM housing retrofit). Front bumper replaced with a **Stillen** lip spoiler and **Morimoto XB LED** headlights (HID projector retrofit).

Interior overhaul with **Recaro SRD** front seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) wrapped in **Alcantara/leather hybrid** (black with purple stitching), **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel (350mm, suede), and **Defi BF** gauges (oil pressure, boost, AFR) mounted in a **Custom Cages** A-pillar pod. Roll cage by **Autopower** (8-point, bolt-in, chrome-moly).
